mapper.sql: record_id, class_id, mentor_id, mentor_name, student_id, student_name, course_type, course_source, class_date, duration_hours, weekly_hours, status, class_status, rate, topics, comments, feedback_content, review_remark, reviewed_at, submitted_at, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark
mapper.select:
select
from osg_class_record where student_id = #{studentId} and status = 'approved' order by class_date desc, record_id desc

select
from osg_class_record where record_id = #{recordId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into osg_class_record ( class_id, mentor_id, mentor_name, student_id, student_name, course_type, course_source, class_date, duration_hours, weekly_hours, status, class_status, rate, topics, comments, feedback_content, review_remark, reviewed_at, submitted_at, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{classId}, #{mentorId}, #{mentorName}, #{studentId}, #{studentName}, #{courseType}, #{courseSource}, #{classDate}, #{durationHours}, #{weeklyHours}, #{status}, #{classStatus}, #{rate}, #{topics}, #{comments}, #{feedbackContent}, #{reviewRemark}, #{reviewedAt}, #{submittedAt}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )

insert into osg_class_record ( class_id, mentor_id, mentor_name, student_id, student_name, course_type, course_source, class_date, duration_hours, weekly_hours, status, class_status, rate, topics, comments, feedback_content, submitted_at, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag ) values ( #{classId}, #{mentorId}, #{mentorName}, #{studentId}, #{studentName}, #{courseType}, #{courseSource}, #{classDate}, #{durationHours}, #{weeklyHours}, #{status}, #{classStatus}, #{rate}, #{topics}, #{comments}, #{feedbackContent}, #{submittedAt}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), '0' )
